creator: danger@FreeBSD.org
text:
I would like to request somebody(tm) to port the OpenResty web platform which is based on nginx http server, see https://openresty.org/.

I noticed we already have a few nginx modules from the openresty project in ports available as nginx options and was wondering whether it would be better to just add the missing modules, or make openresty as a whole new port. You can read the discussion here:
https://groups.google.com/forum/#!topic/openresty-en/JYZLQW_eRfc

Thanks in advance!
